prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Provide a quick fleet-status snapshot. Enumerate the transformers currently in service, then for one representative healthy unit (T-005) and one degraded unit (T-013) surface the available sensor channels and a recent telemetry sample for each channel so a comparative read of operational state can be made.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should list the in-service transformer IDs, then for each of T-005 and T-013 surface the available sensor channels and a recent telemetry sample for each channel, and call out any qualitative difference between the two units.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] list_assets — Enumerate all transformers currently in service
  Step 2: [iot] get_asset_metadata — Get metadata for a healthy unit (T-005) (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [iot] get_asset_metadata — Get metadata for a degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [1])
  Step 4: [iot] list_sensors — List available sensor channels for T-005 (depends on steps [2])
  Step 5: [iot] list_sensors — List available sensor channels for T-013 (depends on steps [3])
  Step 6: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get recent telemetry sample for each channel on T-005 (depends on steps [2, 4])
  Step 7: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get recent telemetry sample for each channel on T-013 (depends on steps [3, 5])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Enumerate all transformers currently in service",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_assets",
    "tool_args": {
      "health_status": "any"
    },
    "response": "Error executing tool list_assets: 1 validation error for list_assetsArguments\nhealth_status\n  Input should be a valid integer, unable to parse string as an integer [type=int_parsing, input_value='any', input_type=str]\n    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/int_parsing",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Get metadata for a healthy unit (T-005)",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "get_asset_metadata",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-005",
      "health_status": 1,
      "sensor_channels": [],
      "telemetry_sample": {}
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-005\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-005\",\n  \"manufacturer\": \"ABB\",\n  \"location\": \"Substation Alpha\",\n  \"voltage_class\": \"11kV/0.4kV\",\n  \"rating_kva\": 1000,\n  \"install_date\": \"2012-05-05\",\n  \"age_years\": 12,\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"fdd_category\": 1,\n  \"rul_days\": 3364,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Get metadata for a degraded unit (T-013)",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "get_asset_metadata",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-013",
      "health_status": 1,
      "name": "Power Transformer T-005",
      "manufacturer": "ABB",
      "location": "Substation Alpha",
      "voltage_class": "11kV/0.4kV",
      "rating_kva": 1000,
      "install_date": "2012-05-05",
      "age_years": 12,
      "fdd_category": 1,
      "rul_days": 3364,
      "in_service": true
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-013\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-013\",\n  \"manufacturer\": \"GE\",\n  \"location\": \"Distribution Center 2\",\n  \"voltage_class\": \"33kV/11kV\",\n  \"rating_kva\": 500,\n  \"install_date\": \"2018-09-10\",\n  \"age_years\": 6,\n  \"health_status\": 1,\n  \"fdd_category\": 2,\n  \"rul_days\": 922,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 4,

    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_sensors",
    "tool_args": {

      "health_status": 0,
      "in_service": true
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"load_current_a\",\n  \"unit\": \"A\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"power_factor\",\n  \"unit\": \"\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_hv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_lv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}",
    "executor_success": true,

    "executor_success": true,

## Agent Final Answer
**Fleet Status Snapshot:**

**Transformers Currently in Service:**

**Available Sensor Channels and Recent Telemetry Samples:**

  - Low Voltage (kV): Not available (error in step 5)
  - Winding Temperature (°C): Not available (error in step 5)

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
